sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30065" key="e)gka/qeirktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐγκάθ-ειρκτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n30065.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shut in, enclosed</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0096.tlg002:40" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aesop.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">40</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
